expected: Edit input elements are disabled

expected: Admin panel link is hidden or inaccessible

steps: Tamper user_id field inside web storage JWT token
expected: API requests are rejected with HTTP 401 Unauthorized

expected: Registration succeeds with default 'farmer' role

name: Add Crop form - submit empty name validation

preconditions: User has typed values in add crop form
expected: Discard changes confirmation dialog pops up

name: Mandi query search form inputs verification

steps: Fill states field, crop name, click query
expected: Mandi query results list is populated

name: Form auto-save draft verification check
preconditions: User is filling crop diagnostics report
expected: Draft is preserved locally and loaded on reopen

expected: Fallbacks to file picker selector automatically

name: Access tokens expiration silent updates checks

steps: Leave app idle on tab screen
expected: Session terminates, user is redirected to login screen

name: Concurrent logins alerts and active terminations

steps: Log in with same credentials on new page
expected: Initial window redirects showing 'Session terminated'

name: Clear browser cookies session logs termination
preconditions: User clears cookies inside browser settings
expected: Session is cleared and user is redirected to login page
